title: SMPOnline Season 5 Modpack (Official)
description: Client-side rendering optimizations and modded features (such as Painting), intended for use on SMPOnline Season 5
body:
# SMPOnline S5 Modpack
This is the official SMPOnline modpack for Season 5, maintained by codeHusky. This modpack contains all of the recommended content mods, as well as recommended optimization mods for good client performance on the server.

## Content Mods

> The **Joy of Painting** version we use ("xercapaint") is an unofficial 1.21.11 port. **Please report all issues as described in Help & Support.**

The current Content Mods we use on Season 5 are Camerapture and Joy of Painting. Camerapture allows for taking photos in-game and displaying them in your builds. Joy of Painting lets you, well, paint! Give these mods a try on the server!

## Optimizations
This modpack includes Sodium and ImmediatelyFast, two extremely important mods for good performance on any hardware. ImmediatelyFast improves rendering of Maps, Signs, and more, making it far easier to maintain FPS in popular towns on the server.

## Help & Support
For help with this modpack, please [visit our Documentation website](https://docs.callmecarson.live/books/smp-online). 

Any problems with **Joy of Painting** should be reported to the 1.21.11 port's Pull Request [here](https://github.com/ercanserteli/xercamods/pull/167). The version we're using is a custom port that has not been merged with the main project, so problems sent their way will be useless.

If there are any issues with **Camerapture** you can also report that to us directly via a ticket.
